title: XML entity
text: XML entity Named replacement texts defined in the XML recommendation, DTD, or XML document. Entities start with an ampersand (&), followed by the entity name, and end with a semicolon (;). For example, the entity < is defined in the XML Recommendation www.w3.org/XML and is replaced with < when an XML document is parsed. Entity is used in several contexts in our documentation. Use the following terms (if possible) in preference to using the unqualified term entity: XML entity, predefined entity, numeric entity, parameter entity, replacement text. Was this topic helpful?
